channel.title: Debian on Guixian 的日常记录
channel.description: Recent content in Debian on Guixian 的日常记录

item.title: Debian 的发行版
item.description: Debian 的版本 Debian各个发行版及其代号： Debian 1.1 - Buzz Debian 1.2 - Rex Debian 1.3 - Bo Debian 2.0 - Hamm Debian 2.1 - Slink Debian 2.2 - Potato Debian 3.0 - Woody Debian 3.1 - Sarge Debian 4.0 - Etch Debian 5.0 - Lenny Debian 6.0 - Squeeze Debian 7.0 - Wheezy Debian 8.0
